data.title: CZ Memoir Details FTX Collapse: SBF Asked for Billions 'Like a Bologna Sandwich'
data.description: According to CoinDesk, Binance founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) writes in his memoir Freedom of Money, released Tuesday, that he never seriously intended to acquire FTX during its November 2022 collapse, describing Sam Bankman-Fried's funding request as made "nonchalantly, as if he were asking for a bologna sandwich," and characterizing the non-binding letter of intent as a formality to assess user protection options. CZ identifies Alameda CEO Caroline Ellison's public offer to buy FTT at $22 as a "fatal mistake" that gave professional traders a floor price to short, sending the token from $22 to $5 and triggering $6 billion in outflows within 72 hours. He also discloses a Signal group called "Exchange Collaboration," set up by FTX's Zane Tackett during the Terra/LUNA collapse, including executives from Binance, Coinbase, Kraken and FTX, which later drew DOJ and SEC scrutiny; CZ denies any collusion. A subsequent bank run on Binance saw $7 billion withdrawn in a single day on Dec. 14, 2022, which CZ says was fully backed by reserves and reversed within a month.

data.title: KakaoBank Aims to Lead Korean Won-Backed Stablecoin Issuance
data.description: KakaoBank has announced its primary business goal for this year is to spearhead the issuance and distribution of a stablecoin backed by the Korean won. According to NS3.AI, this initiative aligns with KakaoBank's ambition to become a global connector. Additionally, the bank is transitioning into an AI native bank and has plans to expand its operations into Mongolia, following its entry into the Indonesian and Thai markets.

data.title: U.S. to Urge Iran to Halt Nuclear Activities in Upcoming Talks
data.description: Senior U.S. government officials have announced that Washington will push Iran to eliminate nuclear materials, cease uranium enrichment, and address ballistic missile threats during negotiations set to occur over the next two weeks. According to NS3.AI, these discussions will also involve coordination with Israel regarding a temporary ceasefire.

data.title: Iran says it agrees to negotiations but has "complete distrust" of the United States.
data.description: Iran's Supreme National Security Council issued a statement on the 8th, saying that based on the suggestion of Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei and with the approval of the Council, Iran will hold two weeks of talks with the United States in Islamabad, the capital of Pakistan, on the 10th. However, Iran expressed "complete distrust" of the United States. (Xinhua)

data.title: US officials: We will firmly insist that Iran remove its nuclear materials and halt uranium enrichment.
data.description: According to Israel's N12 news agency, a senior US government official stated that the US had coordinated with Israel beforehand regarding a temporary ceasefire. The US has made it clear to Israel that during the negotiations to be held over the next two weeks, it will firmly insist that Iran remove its nuclear materials, cease uranium enrichment, and eliminate the ballistic missile threat. (Jinshi)

data.title: Circle Expands Stablecoin Payment Services to Asia
data.description: Circle has announced the launch of its Stablecoin Payouts service for Circle Mint partners in Singapore. According to Foresight News, this initiative aims to extend Circle's payment infrastructure across Asia. The service is designed for global scalability, assisting businesses in automating payment processes, reducing manual operation complexities, and facilitating more efficient cross-border fund transfers using stablecoins like USDC.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Hong Kong AI Stocks Surge at Market Open
data.description: Hong Kong's AI application stocks experienced a significant rise at the market opening. According to Jin10, Zhihu (02513.HK) saw a notable increase of 14.89%, while MINIMAX-W (00100.HK) opened over 8% higher. Other stocks, including Kingsoft Cloud (03896.HK) and Kingsoft Corporation (03888.HK), also opened with gains.

data.title: TRON Experiences Significant Decline Amid Mixed U.S. Crypto-Sector Performance
data.description: TRON witnessed a notable drop of over 7.92% as U.S. crypto-sector names closed with mixed results. According to NS3.AI, the Dow Jones Industrial Average decreased by 0.18%, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite showed slight gains, rising by 0.08% and 0.1%, respectively. This mixed performance reflects ongoing volatility in the financial markets.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Prices Rise as Crude Oil Declines
data.description: Gold prices increased to $4,818.33 per ounce, according to NS3.AI. Meanwhile, WTI crude oil experienced a significant intraday drop of 11.91%, settling at $98.06 per barrel. Silver also saw a rise, climbing 4.33% to $76.070. In contrast, Brent crude oil fell by 9.52% to $98.43. Despite the fluctuations in commodity prices, major European stock indices showed upward movement.

data.description:
1. Trump: I agree to a two-week ceasefire to suspend bombing and attacks on Iran; this will be a two-way ceasefire.
2. Iran accepts Pakistan's two-week ceasefire proposal.

8. Yi Lihua: The current market environment is similar to 2019; focus on secondary market bottom-fishing and primary market investment opportunities.
9. Pump.fun team/investor-related addresses deposited 2.34 billion PUMPs into CEX.

data.title: Polymarket Prediction on Jesus' Return by 2027 Gains Attention
data.description:
A significant prediction event on Polymarket, titled "Jesus will not return to Earth before 2027," has garnered attention due to a notable account profiting over $1 million. According to Odaily, this account, identified by the address 0x13414a77a4be48988851c73dfd824d0168e70853, invested a total of $480,000 at an average opening price of 96.1¢. The event's outcome relies on consensus from credible sources, which have not been disclosed.

The concept of Jesus' return, also known as the Second Advent or Parousia, is rooted in Christian theology. It refers to the belief that Jesus, who first came to Earth over two millennia ago and ascended to heaven, will return in the future. This belief is based on messianic prophecies found in the canonical gospels and is a component of most Christian eschatology.

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Orders Ceasefire for Military Units
data.description: Iran's Supreme Leader has directed all military units to cease fire. According to ChainCatcher, this announcement was reported by the Islamic Republic of Iran Broadcasting (IRIB).

data.title: Danal Fintech and JB Jeonbuk Bank Advance Stablecoin Initiative for Foreign Nationals
data.description: Danal Fintech and JB Jeonbuk Bank have successfully completed a proof-of-concept for a won-based stablecoin, focusing on distribution, merchant payments, and settlement. According to NS3.AI, the companies are now preparing a second proof-of-concept aimed at foreign nationals. JB Jeonbuk Bank is targeting stablecoin payments and overseas remittances to facilitate financial transactions for foreign workers.

data.title: Seamless to Cease Operations Amid Market Challenges
data.description: Seamless, a lending protocol operating on the Base platform, has announced its decision to terminate services on June 30. According to NS3.AI, the company cited that its leveraged tokens are no longer compatible with the prevailing market conditions. This move reflects the ongoing adjustments within the cryptocurrency sector as platforms reassess their offerings in response to market dynamics.

data.title: Gold rose to $4,818.33, while WTI crude oil fell by more than 11%.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices rose to $4,818.33 per ounce, a daily increase of 2.39%. Silver prices rose to $76.070 per ounce, a daily increase of 4.33%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 47.73, a daily decrease of 0.33%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 69.20, a daily increase of 1.93%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.29% to 6.83435. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.61% to 158.637. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 0.11% to 5,707.60 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 1.68% to 10,594.23 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 3.15% to 23,965.62 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 11.91% to $98.06 per barrel, while Brent crude oil fell 9.52% to $98.43 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Currently only buying one asset, which is HYPE.
data.description: Arthur Hayes posted on X: "The only asset we are currently buying is HYPE."

data.title: Arthur Hayes Comments on Current Market Trends
data.description: Arthur Hayes has expressed his views on the current market situation. According to Foresight News, Hayes stated that the only thing being purchased at the moment is hype.

data.title: Lighter Announces Significant Token Buyback
data.description: Lighter has announced on X that it has repurchased 10 million LIT tokens since its Token Generation Event (TGE). According to Odaily, this buyback represents 4% of the circulating supply.

data.title: Iran and Oman to Charge Fees for Ships Passing Through Strait of Hormuz
data.description: A regional official has disclosed a two-week ceasefire plan that includes provisions for Iran and Oman to impose fees on vessels navigating the Strait of Hormuz. According to ChainCatcher, this development follows discussions aimed at easing tensions in the region. The strategic waterway is a critical passage for global oil shipments, and the introduction of fees could have significant implications for international trade.

data.title: Market Conditions Mirror 2019, Says Liquid Capital Founder
data.description:
Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua recently shared insights on social media, noting similarities between the current market environment and that of 2019. According to Odaily, he highlighted a decrease in liquidity in the secondary market, a lack of confidence in primary investments, and increased personnel movement within the industry.

Yi Lihua suggested that during cautious market sentiment phases, focusing on bottom-fishing in the secondary market and primary investments might become key areas of interest. He also mentioned that similar strategies in 2019 led to significant outcomes in subsequent market trends.
